ops.text:
GOLDEN SCREEN COMPLETE (report-only, base-only model per pre-registered cmd) — 44 min wall under HEAVY host contention (load avg ~25; unrelated stream-trade/ppocr/asr jobs + sibling cc-steer arms sharing CPU+Metal). Internal elapsed 2631.6s. eval_auc.json written. Extraction est was ~3min/actual 9.5min, so this host runs ~3x nominal.

30-row golden watcher-fires (15 warranted / 15 negative), base Qwen3-8B-4bit WITHOUT v002 adapter:
- baseline AUC = 0.4200 (CI [0.25,0.585]) — near/below chance, as expected for base-only on this set (deployed base+v002 scores ~0.93 here). Screen noise floor huge; task says do NOT verdict on it.
- Ranking DOMINATED by negative-sign (alpha<0, bias toward NO_STEER/abstain): all top-6 are sign=-. This looks like a global threshold/level shift that rescues a near-chance discriminator.
- BEST (max delta_vs_base): L8 · mag16 · sign=-1 -> AUC 0.6289, delta +0.2089 (clears the ~0.15 screen bar). Next: L12·mag16·- (+0.160), L12·mag8·- (+0.140), L16·mag16·- (+0.122), L8·mag8·- (+0.116).
- Positive-sign configs mostly ~0 or slightly negative delta (L12·mag16·+ = -0.011 worst).

DECISION: full-frame-validate the single best screened config L8/mag16/sign-1 (alpha = -16/norm[8] = -16/36.294 = -0.4409) through the DEPLOYMENT path (MlxDrafter base+v002), persisting per-row probs for BOTH arms, paired DeLong verdict per card. CAVEAT restated: the screen optimized a broken base-only model; a large negative L8 vector may well HURT the strong base+v002 model — the paired full-frame test is the governing measurement and will settle it. Golden worker exited (bg task exit 0); model unloaded before full-frame load (one model at a time).
